TEXT.citation: Early, R. J., & Whitehorn, J. (2003). One hundred Paiwan texts. Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{100paiwantexts, author = {Robert Early and John Whitehorn}, title = {One Hundred Paiwan Texts}, year = {2003}, publisher = {Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University}}

S.FORM: ti sa Kapurar ka sitsuayan laḍuq aravats a nimadju.
S.PHON: ti sa kapurar ka siʦuajan ɭaɖuq aravaʦ a nimaɉu.
S.FORM: ti sa Kapurar ka sicuayan ladruq aravac a nimadju.
S.PHON: ti sa kapuRaR ka siʦuajan ɣaɖuq aRavaʦ a nimaɉu.
S.TRANSL: Once upon a time Kapurar had a very long penis [lit. his was very long].

S.FORM: qau nu masiasik a vavayavayan, vaik a sema qapaz.
S.PHON: qau nu masiasik a vavajavajan, vaik a səma qapaz.
S.FORM: qau nu masiasik a vavayavayan, vaik a sema qapaz.
S.PHON: qau nu masiasik a vavajavajan, vaik a səma qapaz.
S.TRANSL: When women were weeding the fields, he went to the edge of the field.

S.FORM: qau sa qiladj, sa saksaki a kulits.
S.PHON: qau sa qiɭaɉ, sa saksaki a kuɭiʦ.
S.FORM: qau sa qiladj, sa saksaki a kulic.
S.PHON: qau sa qiɣaɉ, sa saksaki a kuɣiʦ.
S.TRANSL: He sat down and exposed his penis,

S.FORM: qau sa pataluvtuvan tua inasikan a tsemel nua vavayavayan.
S.PHON: qau sa pataɭuvtuvan tua inasikan a ʦəməɭ nua vavajavajan.
S.FORM: qau sa pataluvtuvan tua inasikan a cemel nua vavayavayan.
S.PHON: qau sa pataɣuvtuvan tua inasikan a ʦəməɣ nua vavajavajan.
S.TRANSL: and it went through the grass the women had weeded out.

S.FORM: nu tjaɫu inu a vavayavayan, tjaɫu inu uta a kulits a lemailaing.
S.PHON: nu caʎu inu a vavajavajan, caʎu inu uta a kuɭiʦ a ɭəmaiɭaiŋ.
S.FORM: nu tjalju inu a vavayavayan, tjalju inu uta a kulic a lemailaing.
S.PHON: nu ʦaʎu inu a vavajavajan, ʦaʎu inu uta a kuɣiʦ a ɣəmaiɣaiŋ.
S.TRANSL: Wherever the women went the penis followed,

S.FORM: qau sa tsektsektseki a kinaḍangan nua vavayavayan.
S.PHON: qau sa ʦəkʦəkʦəki a kinaɖaŋan nua vavajavajan.
S.FORM: qau sa cekcekceki a kinadrangan nua vavayavayan.
S.PHON: qau sa ʦəkʦəkʦəki a kinaɖaŋan nua vavajavajan.
S.TRANSL: and touched the women’s private parts.

S.FORM: qau qarawqaw a vavayavayan a mavilad tua rekutjan tazua kulits ni sa Kapurar.
S.PHON: qau qarawqaw a vavajavajan a maviɭad tua rəkucan tazua kuɭiʦ ni sa kapurar.
S.FORM: qau qarawqaw a vavayavayan a mavilad tua rekutjan tazua kulic ni sa Kapurar.
S.PHON: qau qaRawqaw a vavajavajan a maviɣad tua Rəkuʦan tazua kuɣiʦ ni sa kapuRaR.
S.TRANSL: The women screamed and ran away for fear of Kapurar’s penis.

S.FORM: ɫakua tavaken anga a tsuatsuay anga; ini anga ka rekutji.
S.PHON: ʎakua tavakən aŋa a ʦuaʦuaj aŋa; ini aŋa ka rəkuci.
S.FORM: ljakua tavaken anga a cuacuay anga; ini anga ka rekutji.
S.PHON: ʎakua tavakən aŋa a ʦuaʦuaj aŋa; ini aŋa ka Rəkuʦi.
S.TRANSL: But after a time they got used to it and weren’t frightened any more.

S.FORM: qau nu masiasik a vavayavayan, sa tsektseki a kinaḍangan, tsektsekan uta azua kulits ni sa Kapurar tua vuka.
S.PHON: qau nu masiasik a vavajavajan, sa ʦəkʦəki a kinaɖaŋan, ʦəkʦəkan uta azua kuɭiʦ ni sa kapurar tua vuka.
S.FORM: qau nu masiasik a vavayavayan, sa cekceki a kinadrangan, cekcekan uta azua kulic ni sa Kapurar tua vuka.
S.PHON: qau nu masiasik a vavajavajan, sa ʦəkʦəki a kinaɖaŋan, ʦəkʦəkan uta azua kuɣiʦ ni sa kapuRaR tua vuka.
S.TRANSL: When the women were weeding and their private parts were touched, they hit back at Kapurar’s penis with their digging-sticks.

S.FORM: ɫakua ini keɫang azua vavayavayan tu kasi inu a mangtjez.
S.PHON: ʎakua ini kəʎaŋ azua vavajavajan tu kasi inu a maŋcəz.
S.FORM: ljakua ini keljang azua vavayavayan tu kasi inu a mangtjez.
S.PHON: ʎakua ini kəʎaŋ azua vavajavajan tu kasi inu a maŋʦəz.
S.TRANSL: But the women didn’t know where it came from.

S.FORM: nu tsektsekan tua vuka, maulaw.
S.PHON: nu ʦəkʦəkan tua vuka, mauɭaw.
S.FORM: nu cekcekan tua vuka, maulaw.
S.PHON: nu ʦəkʦəkan tua vuka, mauɣaw.
S.TRANSL: When they hit it with their digging-sticks, it disappeared.

S.FORM: tsuay anga uta mangtjez azua kulits.
S.PHON: ʦuaj aŋa uta maŋcəz azua kuɭiʦ.
S.FORM: cuay anga uta mangtjez azua kulic.
S.PHON: ʦuaj aŋa uta maŋʦəz azua kuɣiʦ.
S.TRANSL: After a time it would come back again,

S.FORM: qau tsektsekan uta tua vuka.
S.PHON: qau ʦəkʦəkan uta tua vuka.
S.FORM: qau cekcekan uta tua vuka.
S.PHON: qau ʦəkʦəkan uta tua vuka.
S.TRANSL: and get hit again with digging-sticks.

S.FORM: "tsevuk," aya azua kulits ni sa Kapurar.
S.PHON: "ʦəvuk," aja azua kuɭiʦ ni sa kapurar.
S.FORM: "cevuk," aya azua kulic ni sa Kapurar.
S.PHON: "ʦəvuk," aja azua kuɣiʦ ni sa kapuRaR.
S.TRANSL: “Tsevuk,” said Kapurar’s penis.

S.FORM: azua kulits ni sa Kapurar semamaɫi a kinalaḍuq.
S.PHON: azua kuɭiʦ ni sa kapurar səmamaʎi a kinaɭaɖuq.
S.FORM: azua kulic ni sa Kapurar semamalji a kinaladruq.
S.PHON: azua kuɣiʦ ni sa kapuRaR səmamaʎi a kinaɣaɖuq.
S.TRANSL: Kapurar’s penis was an amazing length.

S.FORM: sinivaɫavaɫan azua kulits a palayulayu.
S.PHON: sinivaʎavaʎan azua kuɭiʦ a paɭajuɭaju.
S.FORM: sinivaljavaljan azua kulic a palayulayu.
S.PHON: sinivaʎavaʎan azua kuɣiʦ a paɣajuɣaju.
S.TRANSL: He had it hanging(?) over his shoulder(?).

S.FORM: manu vaik tiamadju a qemaɫup.
S.PHON: manu vaik tiamaɉu a qəmaʎup.
S.FORM: manu vaik tiamadju a qemaljup.
S.PHON: manu vaik tiamaɉu a qəmaʎup.
S.TRANSL: They went off to hunt.

S.FORM: qau kiɫavaranan nua qaliqali: "tja qeneqenetjay a su kulits," ayain azua ti sa Kapurar nua qaliqali.
S.PHON: qau kiʎavaranan nua qaɭiqaɭi: "ca qənəqənəcaj a su kuɭiʦ," ajain azua ti sa kapurar nua qaɭiqaɭi.
S.FORM: qau kiljavaranan nua qaliqali: "tja qeneqenetjay a su kulic," ayain azua ti sa Kapurar nua qaliqali.
S.PHON: qau kiʎavaRanan nua qaɣiqaɣi: "ʦa qənəqənəʦaj a su kuɣiʦ," ajain azua ti sa kapuRaR nua qaɣiqaɣi.
S.TRANSL: The others said: “Let’s have a look at your penis,” they said to Kapurar.

S.FORM: qau saksaken azua kulits, sa pakiqenetjan tua qaliqali.
S.PHON: qau saksakən azua kuɭiʦ, sa pakiqənəcan tua qaɭiqaɭi.
S.FORM: qau saksaken azua kulic, sa pakiqenetjan tua qaliqali.
S.PHON: qau saksakən azua kuɣiʦ, sa pakiqənəʦan tua qaɣiqaɣi.
S.TRANSL: He exposed his penis and showed it to them.

S.FORM: manu maka kiqenetj a qaliqali.
S.PHON: manu maka kiqənəc a qaɭiqaɭi.
S.FORM: manu maka kiqenetj a qaliqali.
S.PHON: manu maka kiqənəʦ a qaɣiqaɣi.
S.TRANSL: When they had finished looking at it,

S.FORM: "aitsu anga qaɫa," ayain nua qaliqali a ventsa.
S.PHON: "aiʦu aŋa qaʎa," ajain nua qaɭiqaɭi a vənʦa.
S.FORM: "aicu anga qalja," ayain nua qaliqali a venca.
S.PHON: "aiʦu aŋa qaʎa," ajain nua qaɣiqaɣi a vənʦa.
S.TRANSL: the others lied and said: “The enemy have come.”

S.FORM: ini kiamaw anga a venaɫavaɫan tua kulits ti sa Kapurar.
S.PHON: ini kiamaw aŋa a vənaʎavaʎan tua kuɭiʦ ti sa kapurar.
S.FORM: ini kiamaw anga a venaljavaljan tua kulic ti sa Kapurar.
S.PHON: ini kiamaw aŋa a vənaʎavaʎan tua kuɣiʦ ti sa kapuRaR.
S.TRANSL: Kapurar didn’t have time to shoulder his penis;

S.FORM: mintuluq timadju.
S.PHON: mintuɭuq timaɉu.
S.FORM: mintuluq timadju.
S.PHON: mintuɣuq timaɉu.
S.TRANSL: he just ran.

S.FORM: qau rakatsen anga a kulits maka tjua djuidjuiin.
S.PHON: qau rakaʦən aŋa a kuɭiʦ maka cua ɉuiɉuiin.
S.FORM: qau rakacen anga a kulic maka tjua djuidjuiin.
S.PHON: qau Rakaʦən aŋa a kuɣiʦ maka ʦua ɉuiɉuiin.
S.TRANSL: His penis was dragged through thorny bushes.

S.FORM: qau djemaɫun ti sa Kapurar i tjumaq.
S.PHON: qau ɉəmaʎun ti sa kapurar i cumaq.
S.FORM: qau djemaljun ti sa Kapurar i tjumaq.
S.PHON: qau ɉəmaʎun ti sa kapuRaR i ʦumaq.
S.TRANSL: When he got home,

S.FORM: qau qemaqivu tua qaliqali, sa pasudjuian a kulits.
S.PHON: qau qəmaqivu tua qaɭiqaɭi, sa pasuɉuian a kuɭiʦ.
S.FORM: qau qemaqivu tua qaliqali, sa pasudjuian a kulic.
S.PHON: qau qəmaqivu tua qaɣiqaɣi, sa pasuɉuian a kuɣiʦ.
S.TRANSL: he called some people and got them to remove the thorns from his penis.

S.FORM: qau azua djui pitjua djilungen, sa padjungi.
S.PHON: qau azua ɉui picua ɉiɭuŋən, sa paɉuŋi.
S.FORM: qau azua djui pitjua djilungen, sa padjungi.
S.PHON: qau azua ɉui piʦua ɉiɣuŋən, sa paɉuŋi.
S.TRANSL: The thorns were put in pots and stored away.

S.FORM: qau tsuatsuay anga, "kevava-u kevava-u," ayain a qaliqali.
S.PHON: qau ʦuaʦuaj aŋa, "kəvava-u kəvava-u," ajain a qaɭiqaɭi.
S.FORM: qau cuacuay anga, "kevava-u kevava-u," ayain a qaliqali.
S.PHON: qau ʦuaʦuaj aŋa, "kəvava-u kəvava-u," ajain a qaɣiqaɣi.
S.TRANSL: After some time he said to the others: “Come and drink some beer, drink some beer.”

S.FORM: qau mangtjez a qaliqali.
S.PHON: qau maŋcəz a qaɭiqaɭi.
S.FORM: qau mangtjez a qaliqali.
S.PHON: qau maŋʦəz a qaɣiqaɣi.
S.TRANSL: The others came,

S.FORM: paɫetekuin azua djilung.
S.PHON: paʎətəkuin azua ɉiɭuŋ.
S.FORM: paljetekuin azua djilung.
S.PHON: paʎətəkuin azua ɉiɣuŋ.
S.TRANSL: and he brought out the pots.

S.FORM: "aitsu a vava, kevava-u a matsidiɫ," ayain a qaliqali.
S.PHON: "aiʦu a vava, kəvava-u a maʦidiʎ," ajain a qaɭiqaɭi.
S.FORM: "aicu a vava, kevava-u a macidilj," ayain a qaliqali.
S.PHON: "aiʦu a vava, kəvava-u a maʦidiʎ," ajain a qaɣiqaɣi.
S.TRANSL: “Anyone can drink this beer as they want,” he said to the others.

S.FORM: qau azua vava tjanu sepatj i djilung.
S.PHON: qau azua vava canu səpac i ɉiɭuŋ.
S.FORM: qau azua vava tjanu sepatj i djilung.
S.PHON: qau azua vava ʦanu səpaʦ i ɉiɣuŋ.
S.TRANSL: There were four pots full of beer.

S.FORM: masalu a qaliqali.
S.PHON: masaɭu a qaɭiqaɭi.
S.FORM: masalu a qaliqali.
S.PHON: masaɣu a qaɣiqaɣi.
S.TRANSL: The others were pleased,

S.FORM: kiɫuvaq a vaik a semutsaqev tazua djilung.
S.PHON: kiʎuvaq a vaik a səmuʦaqəv tazua ɉiɭuŋ.
S.FORM: kiljuvaq a vaik a semucaqev tazua djilung.
S.PHON: kiʎuvaq a vaik a səmuʦaqəv tazua ɉiɣuŋ.
S.TRANSL: and raced to go and take the lids off the pots.

S.FORM: manu sutsaqevan a djilung; milayap a pangats, sa tsaɫedji azua qaliqali a naventsa tjaimadju.
S.PHON: manu suʦaqəvan a ɉiɭuŋ; miɭajap a paŋaʦ, sa ʦaʎəɉi azua qaɭiqaɭi a navənʦa caimaɉu.
S.FORM: manu sucaqevan a djilung; milayap a pangac, sa caljedji azua qaliqali a navenca tjaimadju.
S.PHON: manu suʦaqəvan a ɉiɣuŋ; miɣajap a paŋaʦ, sa ʦaʎəɉi azua qaɣiqaɣi a navənʦa ʦaimaɉu.
S.TRANSL: When the lids were taken off the pots, out flew wasps and hornets and stung those who had lied to him.

S.FORM: qau mavilad azua qaliqali a mapuɫat.
S.PHON: qau maviɭad azua qaɭiqaɭi a mapuʎat.
S.FORM: qau mavilad azua qaliqali a mapuljat.
S.PHON: qau maviɣad azua qaɣiqaɣi a mapuʎat.
S.TRANSL: And they all ran away.

S.FORM: qau a tjainan djui nua tjavuvuk a kinaqatian.
S.PHON: qau a cainan ɉui nua cavuvuk a kinaqatian.
S.FORM: qau a tjainan djui nua tjavuvuk a kinaqatian.
S.PHON: qau a ʦainan ɉui nua ʦavuvuk a kinaqatian.
S.TRANSL: The bees were made from the thorns of wild strawberries,

S.FORM: qau a tjiḍiuɫ djui nua ɫadjudju.
S.PHON: qau a ciɖiuʎ ɉui nua ʎaɉuɉu.
S.FORM: qau a tjidriulj djui nua ljadjudju.
S.PHON: qau a ʦiɖiuʎ ɉui nua ʎaɉuɉu.
S.TRANSL: the large hornets from the thorns of paliurus,

S.FORM: qau a tsalukuɫ djui nua kadjuian.
S.PHON: qau a ʦaɭukuʎ ɉui nua kaɉuian.
S.FORM: qau a calukulj djui nua kadjuian.
S.PHON: qau a ʦaɣukuʎ ɉui nua kaɉuian.
S.TRANSL: the small hornets(?) from the thorns of the thorn tree,

S.FORM: qau a ɫaɫuvur djui a paqeteleng a kinaqatian.
S.PHON: qau a ʎaʎuvur ɉui a paqətəɭəŋ a kinaqatian.
S.FORM: qau a ljaljuvur djui a paqeteleng a kinaqatian.
S.PHON: qau a ʎaʎuvuR ɉui a paqətəɣəŋ a kinaqatian.
S.TRANSL: and the wasps(?) from various thorns.

S.FORM: qau avan sika uzai nua pangats tutsu.
S.PHON: qau avan sika uzai nua paŋaʦ tuʦu.
S.FORM: qau avan sika uzai nua pangac tucu.
S.PHON: qau avan sika uzai nua paŋaʦ tuʦu.
S.TRANSL: And that’s why there are wasps and hornets now.
